seoTitle: Stockton Unified Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View the Stockton Unified Calendar 2026-2027 with school holidays, Jul 30 first day, May 26 last day, Fall Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, printable PDF and Google Calendar download.
calendarNotes: Stockton Unified lists a 180-day instructional calendar for 2026-2027. The first day of school is July 30, 2026 and the last day is May 26, 2027. Fall Break runs October 5-9, Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 15-19.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Stockton Unified start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Stockton Unified starts the 2026-2027 school year on Thursday, July 30, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Stockton Unified Fall Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Fall Break runs Monday, October 5 through Friday, October 9, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Stockton Unified Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Stockton Unified in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, May 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in the Stockton Unified 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The Stockton Unified 2026-2027 instructional calendar lists 180 school days for students.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Stockton Unified summer break start in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Summer break begins after the last student day on Wednesday, May 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can parents download the Stockton Unified calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: The official Stockton Unified 2026-2027 instructional calendar PDF is linked from this page, and families can also download the MySchoolDates calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

calendarFaqs.q: Does the Stockton Unified calendar include teacher work days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The official instructional calendar includes teacher professional development days and other non-contact days, which families should check when planning childcare and student activities.

customSections.label: Stockton Unified Calendar 2026-2027 Highlights
customSections.content: These are the Stockton Unified dates families usually need first when planning the 2026-2027 school year.

groups.label: At a glance
items: Longest scheduled student break: Winter Break, December 21, 2026-January 1, 2027.
Fall Break is included, running October 5-9, 2026.
Stockton Unified starts in late July, earlier than many California districts, so families should review July teacher non-contact days before the first student attendance day.

customSections.label: Stockton Unified Days Off School 2026-2027
customSections.content: Parents often search for Stockton Unified days off school when planning childcare, family activities, and appointments. Major no-school periods include district holidays, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, teacher professional development days, and other non-contact days.

groups.label: Main no-school categories
items: Teacher professional development and other non-contact days may affect student attendance even when they are not major school holidays.

customSections.label: Local Calendar Notes for Stockton Unified Families
customSections.content: Stockton Unified begins the 2026-2027 school year in late July, earlier than many traditional September-start districts. Families should pay close attention to July professional development and teacher non-contact days before student attendance begins, because staff calendar dates appear immediately before the first student day.

customSections.label: Stockton Unified Calendar Compared With 2025-2026
customSections.content: Families comparing Stockton Unified calendar changes can use this summary to see how the 2026-2027 instructional calendar differs from the previous school year.

customSections.label: Printable Stockton Unified Calendar 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families looking for a printable Stockton Unified calendar can use the official PDF source linked on this page, print this page for a searchable calendar view, or import the calendar file into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is July 30, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: The district calendar lists a 180-day instructional schedule.
